description: You are an MEP BIM Engineer creating the mechanical services model for a new office fit-out. Bonsai (BlenderBIM) is open with a blank IFC4 project. Read the HVAC design brief from /home/ga/Desktop/hvac_brief.txt and create a complete supply air distribution system: (1) Create an IfcUnitaryEquipment named 'AHU-01' representing the Air Handling Unit with a custom property set Pset_UnitaryEquipmentAirHandlingUnit containing properties: NominalSupplyAirFlowRate (value '2500 L/s'), NominalCoolingCapacity (value '45 kW'), NominalHeatingCapacity (value '50 kW'), (2) Create at least 4 IfcDuctSegment elements representing the main supply duct runs, with CrossSectionArea property '0.6 m²' and FlowVelocity '5 m/s' in Pset_DuctSegmentTypeCommon, (3) Create at least 2 IfcAirTerminal elements named 'AT-01' and 'AT-02' with NominalAirFlowRate '150 L/s' in Pset_AirTerminalTypeCommon, (4) Group ALL mechanical elements into a single IfcSystem named 'HVAC Supply Air System' with ObjectType 'HVAC'. Save the model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/hvac_system.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=60. ahu(20)+ducts(20)+terminals(15)+system(25)=80 full. Must achieve ahu+ducts+system=65 minimum path.
